nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level documentation for the ECC rules catalogue, explaining the layered directory structure (a shared common/ core plus per-language directories), the two installation methods (install script and manual), the rules-vs-skills distinction, how to add a new language, and the rule-priority model where language-specific rules override common rules like CSS specificity.
nodes.languageNotes: Markdown catalogue index whose Rule Priority section frames the common-vs-language precedence model using a CSS-specificity analogy.
